templates.template: Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent
templates.name: Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent
templates.description:
This template is designed to monitor Zabbix server metrics via the passive Zabbix agent.

Specify the address of the remote Zabbix server by changing the {$ZABBIX.SERVER.ADDRESS} and {$ZABBIX.SERVER.PORT} macros. Don't forget to adjust the "StatsAllowedIP" parameter in the remote server's configuration file to allow the collection of statistics.

Generated by official Zabbix template tool "Templator"
templates.readme:
## Overview

This template is designed to monitor Zabbix server metrics via the passive Zabbix agent.

## Setup

Specify the address of the remote Zabbix server as the values for the `Zabbix server Address` and `Zabbix server Port` configuration fields. Don't forget to adjust the `StatsAllowedIP` parameter in the remote server's configuration file to allow the collection of statistics.

items.name: Connector queue
items.description: The count of values enqueued in the connector queue.

preprocessing.error_handler_params: No "connector" processes started. Please check "StartConnectors" parameter in the server configuration file.

items.name: Discovery queue
items.description: The count of values enqueued in the discovery queue.

preprocessing.error_handler_params: No "discoverer" processes started. Please check "StartDiscoverers" parameter in the server configuration file.

items.name: LLD queue
items.description: The number of values enqueued in the low-level discovery processing queue.

items.name: Preprocessing queue
items.description: The number of values enqueued in the preprocessing queue.

items.name: Preprocessing direct throughput
items.description: Reflects the direct throughput of the preprocessing.

items.name: Preprocessing queued throughput
items.description: Reflects the queued throughput of the preprocessing.

items.name: Preprocessing direct VPS
items.description: Reflects the count of direct preprocessing values per second.

items.name: Preprocessing queued VPS
items.description: Reflects the count of queued preprocessing values per second.

items.name: Utilization of agent poller data collector processes, in %
items.description: The average percentage of the time during which the agent poller processes have been busy for the last minute.

triggers.expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.agent_poller.avg.busy,10m)>{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"agent poller"}
triggers.recovery_expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.agent_poller.avg.busy,10m)<{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MIN:"agent poller"}
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Utilization of agent poller processes is high
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: Utilization of agent poller processes over {$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"agent poller"}%
triggers.description: Indicates potential performance issues with the agent poller, which may affect monitoring efficiency and response times.

triggers.description: Indicates potential performance issues with the report manager, which may affect monitoring efficiency and response times.

items.name: Utilization of report writer internal processes, in %
items.description: The average percentage of the time during which the report writer processes have been busy for the last minute.

triggers.expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.report_writer.avg.busy,10m)>{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"report writer"}
triggers.recovery_expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.report_writer.avg.busy,10m)<{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MIN:"report writer"}
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Utilization of report writer processes is high
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: Utilization of report writer processes over {$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"report writer"}%
triggers.description: Indicates potential performance issues with the report writer, which may affect monitoring efficiency and response times.

items.name: Utilization of self-monitoring internal processes, in %
items.description: The average percentage of the time during which the self-monitoring processes have been busy for the last minute.

triggers.expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.self-monitoring.avg.busy,10m)>{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"self-monitoring"}
triggers.recovery_expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.self-monitoring.avg.busy,10m)<{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MIN:"self-monitoring"}
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Utilization of self-monitoring processes is high
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: Utilization of self-monitoring processes over {$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"self-monitoring"}%
triggers.description: Indicates potential performance issues with the self-monitoring, which may affect monitoring efficiency and response times.

items.name: Utilization of service manager internal processes, in %
items.description: The average percentage of the time during which the service manager processes have been busy for the last minute.

triggers.expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.service_manager.avg.busy,10m)>{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"service manager"}
triggers.recovery_expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.service_manager.avg.busy,10m)<{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MIN:"service manager"}
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Utilization of service manager processes is high
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: Utilization of service manager processes over {$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"service manager"}%
triggers.description: Indicates potential performance issues with the service manager, which may affect monitoring efficiency and response times.

items.name: Utilization of snmp poller data collector processes, in %
items.description: The average percentage of the time during which the snmp poller processes have been busy for the last minute.

triggers.expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.snmp_poller.avg.busy,10m)>{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"snmp poller"}
triggers.recovery_expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.snmp_poller.avg.busy,10m)<{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MIN:"snmp poller"}
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Utilization of snmp poller processes is high
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: Utilization of snmp poller processes over {$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"snmp poller"}%
triggers.description: Indicates potential performance issues with the snmp poller, which may affect monitoring efficiency and response times.

items.name: Utilization of snmp trapper data collector processes, in %
items.description: The average percentage of the time during which the snmp trapper processes have been busy for the last minute.

triggers.expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.snmp_trapper.avg.busy,10m)>{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"snmp trapper"}
triggers.recovery_expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.snmp_trapper.avg.busy,10m)<{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MIN:"snmp trapper"}
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Utilization of snmp trapper processes is high
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: Utilization of snmp trapper processes over {$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"snmp trapper"}%
triggers.description: Indicates potential performance issues with the snmp trapper, which may affect monitoring efficiency and response times.

items.name: Utilization of task manager internal processes, in %
items.description: The average percentage of the time during which the task manager processes have been busy for the last minute.

triggers.expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.task_manager.avg.busy,10m)>{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"task manager"}
triggers.recovery_expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.task_manager.avg.busy,10m)<{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MIN:"task manager"}
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Utilization of task manager processes is high
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: Utilization of task manager processes over {$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"task manager"}%
triggers.description: Indicates potential performance issues with the task manager, which may affect monitoring efficiency and response times.

items.name: Utilization of timer internal processes, in %
items.description: The average percentage of the time during which the timer processes have been busy for the last minute.

triggers.expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.timer.avg.busy,10m)>{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"timer"}
triggers.recovery_expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.timer.avg.busy,10m)<{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MIN:"timer"}
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Utilization of timer processes is high
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: Utilization of timer processes over {$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"timer"}%
triggers.description: Indicates potential performance issues with the timer, which may affect monitoring efficiency and response times.

items.name: Utilization of trapper data collector processes, in %
items.description: The average percentage of the time during which the trapper processes have been busy for the last minute.

triggers.expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.trapper.avg.busy,10m)>{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"trapper"}
triggers.recovery_expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.trapper.avg.busy,10m)<{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MIN:"trapper"}
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Utilization of trapper processes is high
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: Utilization of trapper processes over {$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"trapper"}%
triggers.description: Indicates potential performance issues with the trapper, which may affect monitoring efficiency and response times.

items.name: Utilization of trigger housekeeper internal processes, in %
items.description: The average percentage of the time during which the trigger housekeeper processes have been busy for the last minute.

triggers.expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.trigger_housekeeper.avg.busy,10m)>{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"trigger housekeeper"}
triggers.recovery_expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.trigger_housekeeper.avg.busy,10m)<{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MIN:"trigger housekeeper"}
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Utilization of trigger housekeeper processes is high
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: Utilization of trigger housekeeper processes over {$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"trigger housekeeper"}%
triggers.description: Indicates potential performance issues with the trigger housekeeper, which may affect monitoring efficiency and response times.

items.name: Utilization of unreachable poller data collector processes, in %
items.description: The average percentage of the time during which the unreachable poller processes have been busy for the last minute.

triggers.expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.unreachable_poller.avg.busy,10m)>{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"unreachable poller"}
triggers.recovery_expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.unreachable_poller.avg.busy,10m)<{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MIN:"unreachable poller"}
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Utilization of unreachable poller processes is high
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: Utilization of unreachable poller processes over {$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"unreachable poller"}%
triggers.description: Indicates potential performance issues with the unreachable poller, which may affect monitoring efficiency and response times.

items.name: Utilization of vmware collector data collector processes, in %
items.description: The average percentage of the time during which the vmware collector processes have been busy for the last minute.

triggers.expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.vmware_collector.avg.busy,10m)>{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"vmware collector"}
triggers.recovery_expression: avg(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/process.vmware_collector.avg.busy,10m)<{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MIN:"vmware collector"}
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Utilization of vmware collector processes is high
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: Utilization of vmware collector processes over {$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"vmware collector"}%
triggers.description: Indicates potential performance issues with the vmware collector, which may affect monitoring efficiency and response times.

items.name: Configuration cache, % used
items.description: The availability statistics of Zabbix configuration cache. The percentage of used data buffer.

triggers.expression: max(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/rcache.buffer.pused,10m)>{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"configuration cache"}
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Excessive configuration cache usage
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: More than {$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"configuration cache"}% used in the configuration cache
triggers.description: Consider increasing `CacheSize` in the `zabbix_server.conf` configuration file.

triggers.expression: nodata(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/rcache.buffer.pused,{$ZABBIX.SERVER.NODATA_TIMEOUT})=1
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Failed to fetch stats data
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: Failed to fetch stats data (or no data for {$ZABBIX.SERVER.NODATA_TIMEOUT})
triggers.description: Zabbix has not received statistics data for `{$ZABBIX.SERVER.NODATA_TIMEOUT}`.

items.name: Zabbix server check
items.description: Flag indicating whether it is a server or not.

triggers.expression: last(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/server_check)=0
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Wrong template assigned
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: Zabbix server template is assigned to Zabbix proxy
triggers.description: Check that the template has been selected correctly.

items.name: Trend function cache, % of unique requests
items.description:
The effectiveness statistics of the Zabbix trend function cache. The percentage of cached items calculated from the sum of the cached items plus requests.
A low percentage most likely means that the cache size can be reduced.

items.name: Trend function cache, % of misses
items.description: The effectiveness statistics of the Zabbix trend function cache. The percentage of cache misses.

items.name: Value cache, % used
items.description: The availability statistics of Zabbix value cache. The percentage of used data buffer.

triggers.expression: max(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/vcache.buffer.pused,10m)>{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"value cache"}
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Excessive value cache usage
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: More than {$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"value cache"}% used in the value cache
triggers.description: Consider increasing `ValueCacheSize` in the `zabbix_server.conf` configuration file.

items.name: Value cache hits
items.description: The effectiveness statistics of Zabbix value cache. The number of cache hits (history values taken from the cache).

items.name: Value cache misses
items.description: The effectiveness statistics of Zabbix value cache. The number of cache misses (history values taken from the database).

items.name: Value cache operating mode
items.description: The operating mode of the value cache.

triggers.expression: last(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/vcache.cache.mode)=1
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Zabbix value cache working in low-memory mode
triggers.description: Once low-memory mode has been switched on, the value cache will remain in this state for 24 hours, even if the problem that triggered this mode is resolved sooner.

items.name: Version
items.description: The version of Zabbix server.

triggers.expression: last(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/version,#1)<>last(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/version,#2) and length(last(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/version))>0
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Version has changed
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: Version has changed (new version: {ITEM.VALUE})
triggers.description: Zabbix server version has changed. Acknowledge to close the problem manually.

items.name: VMware cache, % used
items.description: The availability statistics of Zabbix vmware cache. The percentage of used data buffer.

triggers.expression: max(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/vmware.buffer.pused,10m)>{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"vmware cache"}
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Excessive vmware cache usage
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: More than {$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"vmware cache"}% used in the vmware cache
triggers.description: Consider increasing `VMwareCacheSize` in the `zabbix_server.conf` configuration file.

items.name: Number of values synchronized with the database per second
items.description: Average quantity of values written to the database, recalculated once per minute.

items.name: History write cache, % used
items.description:
The statistics and availability of Zabbix write cache. The percentage of used history buffer.
The history cache is used to store item values. A high number indicates database performance problems.

triggers.expression: max(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/wcache.history.pused,10m)>{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"history cache"}
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Excessive history cache usage
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: More than {$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"history cache"}% used in the history cache
triggers.description: Consider increasing `HistoryCacheSize` in the `zabbix_server.conf` configuration file.

items.name: History index cache, % used
items.description:
The statistics and availability of Zabbix write cache. The percentage of used history index buffer.
The history index cache is used to index values stored in the history cache.

triggers.expression: max(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/wcache.index.pused,10m)>{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"index cache"}
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Excessive history index cache usage
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: More than {$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"index cache"}% used in the history index cache
triggers.description: Consider increasing `HistoryIndexCacheSize` in the `zabbix_server.conf` configuration file.

items.name: Trend write cache, % used
items.description:
The statistics and availability of Zabbix write cache. The percentage of used trend buffer.
The trend cache stores the aggregate of all items that have received data for the current hour.

triggers.expression: max(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/wcache.trend.pused,10m)>{$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"trend cache"}
triggers.name: Zabbix server: Excessive trends cache usage
triggers.event_name: Zabbix server: More than {$ZABBIX.SERVER.UTIL.MAX:"trend cache"}% used in the trends cache
triggers.description: Consider increasing `TrendCacheSize` in the `zabbix_server.conf` configuration file.

items.name: Number of processed values per second
items.description:
The statistics and availability of Zabbix write cache.
The total number of values processed by Zabbix server or Zabbix proxy, except unsupported items.

items.name: Number of processed numeric (float) values per second
items.description:
The statistics and availability of Zabbix write cache.
The number of processed numeric (float) values.

items.name: Number of processed log values per second
items.description:
The statistics and availability of Zabbix write cache.
The number of processed log values.

items.name: Number of processed not supported values per second
items.description:
The statistics and availability of Zabbix write cache.
The number of times the item processing resulted in an item becoming unsupported or remaining in that state.

items.name: Number of processed character values per second
items.description:
The statistics and availability of Zabbix write cache.
The number of processed character values.

items.name: Number of processed text values per second
items.description:
The statistics and availability of Zabbix write cache.
The number of processed text values.

items.name: Number of processed numeric (unsigned) values per second
items.description:
The statistics and availability of Zabbix write cache.
The number of processed numeric (unsigned) values.

items.name: Zabbix proxies stats
items.description: The master item of Zabbix proxies' statistics.

items.name: Queue over 10 minutes
items.description: The number of monitored items in the queue that are delayed by at least 10 minutes.

triggers.expression: min(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/zabbix.stats[{$ZABBIX.SERVER.ADDRESS},{$ZABBIX.SERVER.PORT},queue,10m],10m)>100
triggers.name: Zabbix server: More than 100 items have been missing data for over 10 minutes
triggers.description: Indicates potential issues with network connectivity, agent failures, or unresponsive monitored resources that require attention.

items.name: Queue
items.description: The number of monitored items in the queue that are delayed by at least 6 seconds.

items.name: Zabbix stats
items.description: The master item of Zabbix server statistics.

discovery_rules.name: High availability cluster node discovery
discovery_rules.description: LLD rule with item and trigger prototypes for node discovery.

item_prototypes.name: Cluster node [{#NODE.NAME}]: Address
item_prototypes.description: The IPv4 address of a node.

item_prototypes.name: Cluster node [{#NODE.NAME}]: Last access age
item_prototypes.description: The time between the database's `unix_timestamp()` and the last access time.

item_prototypes.name: Cluster node [{#NODE.NAME}]: Stats
item_prototypes.description: Provides the statistics of a node.

trigger_prototypes.expression: last(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/zabbix.nodes.status[{#NODE.ID}],#1)<>last(/Zabbix server health by Zabbix agent/zabbix.nodes.status[{#NODE.ID}],#2)
trigger_prototypes.name: Zabbix server: Cluster node [{#NODE.NAME}]: Status changed
trigger_prototypes.description: The state of the node has changed. Acknowledge to close the problem manually.

discovery_rules.name: Zabbix proxy discovery
discovery_rules.description: LLD rule with item and trigger prototypes for proxy discovery.

item_prototypes.name: Proxy [{#PROXY.NAME}]: Certificate
item_prototypes.description: The encryption status for connections from a proxy.

item_prototypes.name: Proxy [{#PROXY.NAME}]: Compatibility

trigger_prototypes.name: Zabbix server: Proxy [{#PROXY.NAME}]: Zabbix proxy is not supported
trigger_prototypes.description: Zabbix proxy version is older than server previous LTS release version or server major version is older than proxy major version.

trigger_prototypes.name: Zabbix server: Proxy [{#PROXY.NAME}]: Zabbix proxy is outdated
trigger_prototypes.description: Zabbix proxy version is older than server version, but is partially supported. Only data collection and remote execution is available.

item_prototypes.name: Proxy [{#PROXY.NAME}]: Compression
item_prototypes.description: The compression status of a proxy.

item_prototypes.name: Proxy [{#PROXY.NAME}]: Host count
item_prototypes.description: The number of enabled hosts assigned to a proxy.

item_prototypes.name: Proxy [{#PROXY.NAME}]: Item count
item_prototypes.description: The number of enabled items on enabled hosts assigned to a proxy.

item_prototypes.name: Proxy [{#PROXY.NAME}]: Last seen, in seconds
item_prototypes.description: The time when a proxy was last seen by a server.

trigger_prototypes.name: Zabbix server: Proxy [{#PROXY.NAME}]: Zabbix proxy last seen
trigger_prototypes.event_name: Zabbix server: Proxy [{#PROXY.NAME}]: Zabbix proxy last seen more than {$ZABBIX.PROXY.LAST_SEEN.MAX} seconds ago
trigger_prototypes.description: Zabbix proxy is not updating the configuration data.

trigger_prototypes.name: Zabbix server: Proxy [{#PROXY.NAME}]: Zabbix proxy never seen
trigger_prototypes.description: Zabbix proxy is not updating the configuration data.

item_prototypes.name: Proxy [{#PROXY.NAME}]: PSK
item_prototypes.description: The encryption status for connections from a proxy.

item_prototypes.name: Proxy [{#PROXY.NAME}]: Required VPS
item_prototypes.description: The required performance of a proxy (the number of values that need to be collected per second).

item_prototypes.name: Proxy [{#PROXY.NAME}]: Stats
item_prototypes.description: The statistics for the discovered proxy.

item_prototypes.name: Proxy [{#PROXY.NAME}]: Unencrypted
item_prototypes.description: The encryption status for connections from a proxy.

macros.description: The maximum number of seconds that Zabbix proxy has not been seen.

config.label: Seconds since the last Zabbix proxy seen
config.description: Threshold value of time since the last Zabbix proxy seen for triggers. No less than 0.

macros.description: IP/DNS of the remote Zabbix server (default is 127.0.0.1).

config.label: Zabbix server Address
config.description: IP or DNS of the remote Zabbix server that should be monitored via the Zabbix agent.

macros.description: The time threshold after which statistics are considered unavailable. Used in trigger expressions.

config.label: Time since the last statistic was received
config.description: Threshold value of time since the last statistic was received from the remote server.

macros.description: Port of the remote Zabbix server (default is 10051).

config.label: Zabbix server Port
config.description: Port of the remote Zabbix server that should be monitored via the Zabbix agent. In the range from 1 to 65535 inclusive.

macros.description: Default maximum threshold for percentage utilization triggers (use macro context for specification).

config.label: Maximum process utilization percentage
config.description: Default maximum threshold for process utilization triggers. In the range from 0 to 100 inclusive.

macros.description: Maximum threshold for value cache utilization triggers.

config.label: Maximum value cache utilization percentage
config.description: Threshold for the value cache utilization trigger. In the range from 0 to 100 inclusive.

macros.description: Default minimum threshold for percentage utilization triggers (use macro context for specification).

config.label: Minimum process utilization percentage
config.description: Default minimum threshold for process utilization triggers. In the range from 0 to 100 inclusive.
